scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m http.server 8787 --directory web; else python3 -m http.server 8787 --directory web; fi'
scripts.dev:admin: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python tools/admin_server.py --project-root . --web ./web --data ./combat-wiki/data --port 8899; else python3 tools/admin_server.py --project-root . --web ./web --data ./combat-wiki/data --port 8899; fi'
scripts.build:web: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python tools/build_legacy_site.py --site ./site --out ./web --clean --locales CH,EN --asset-mode remote --force-lang CH; else python3 tools/build_legacy_site.py --site ./site --out ./web --clean --locales CH,EN --asset-mode remote --force-lang CH; fi'
scripts.verify:web: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python tools/verify_web.py --web ./web; else python3 tools/verify_web.py --web ./web; fi'
